document.title: Azure SRE Agent - Reliability Assessment Report
document.subtitle: Production Environment Review
document.author: Azure SRE Platform Team

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.content: The Azure SRE Agent assessment reviewed production reliability, observability, operational readiness, and remediation planning across critical Azure resources. The generated report uses free-flowing pages with proper indentation and a navigable table of contents.

sections.title: Key Findings
rows: CPU utilization exceeded threshold during peak cycle.
Alert routing does not include all primary responders.
Update action groups and escalation paths.
sections.caption: Table 1: Sample reliability findings.

sections.title: Recommendations
content: Enable consistent alert routing for all production workloads.
Review autoscaling policies for high-usage resources.
Include human approval evidence before any remediation execution.
Track remediation progress using a centralized operational dashboard.

sections.title: Approval Status
sections.content: Remediation actions in this report are recommendations only. No remediation execution should occur without approved change evidence and explicit human-in-the-loop authorization.
